titleStmt.title: SII 22.362: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 362. (A.R. No. 362 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. MĀR. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA I—3rd YEAR (A.D. 1218-19).

summary.p: The king claims the attribute “who was pleased to take the chōḷa country”, even in this third regnal year. The inscription registers a public sale of a piece of dry land at Śikaranallūr in Kuṉṟuśūḻ-nāḍu a division of Teṉ-Kōṉāḍu evidently by the Ūrār of the place represented by a committee of seven persons, and its purchase by Nambi Ponnambalakkūttaṉ alias Uḍaiyār Sāṅgēyarayar of Āṟṟūr in Śōḻa-Pāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu for 2(1/2) paḻaṅkāśu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu Aruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu teṉkoṉāṭṭuk kuṉṟucūḻnāṭṭuc cikaranallūr tiruvāḷaṉ coḻamuventaveḷāṉum tiruvuṭai
yaān kotaṇṭaṉum cuntan koḻuntum cuntan kāriyum nampi koḻuntum nampi paṉmanum poṉṉaṉ Oṉṟāyiramuṭaiyāṉum Ivvaṉaivom Eṅkaḷ kiḻai puṉcey vilaikkaṟa viṟkak koḷviruḷiroveṉṟu Orukālāvatu mirukālāva
tu mukkālāvatu muṟkkūṟap piṟkūṟi coḻapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟū ruṭaiyāṉ nampi poṉṉampalakkūttaṉāṉa Uṭaiyār kāṅkeyarāyar koḷve ṉeṉṟu Aruḷicceyya muṉcollappaṭṭa Ivvaṉaivarom nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṟa pu
ṉceykkup perunānkellaiyāvaṉa kiḻpāṟkellai melpaṉainallūr Ūrppotu Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruvāḷar coḻamuventaveḷāṉ ceykku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cuntaṉkoḻuntum nampikoḻu
ntum tiruvaṉ coḻaṉ muventaveḷāṉum nāṉkellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai poṉṉaṉ Oṉṟāyiramuṭaiyāṉum cuntaṉkoḻūntum punceykku teṟkum Āka Icaintaperunāṉke
llaikku Uḷpaṭṭa puncey viṟṟukuṭuttu Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 2 10 5 Ippaḻaṅkācu Iraṇṭaraiyum Āvaṇakkaḷiyekāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccilavaṟakkoṇṭu vilaippramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom
Uṭaiyār kāṅkaiyarāyar piḷḷaikku tiruvāḷar coḻamuventaveḷāṉum tiruvuṭaiyāṉ ko ṉ koḻuntaṉum cuntaṉkāriyum nampikoḻuntum nampipaṉmaṉum
poṉṉaṉ Oṉṟāyiramuṭaiyāṉum Ivvaṉaivommum paṉmāhesura rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
